steps.name: I clear password fields
I clear and enter first name "Dev"
I click save changes button
I should see account details saved success message
I navigate to the login page
I enter username "test_email@12taste.com"
I enter password "test_email@12taste.com"
I click on the login button
I should be logged in successfully
I navigate to the account details page

steps.name: I enter current password "wrongpassword123"
I enter new password "Newpass@123"
I enter confirm new password "Newpass@123"
I click save changes button
I should see wrong password error message
I navigate to the login page
I enter username "test_email@12taste.com"
I enter password "test_email@12taste.com"
I click on the login button
I should be logged in successfully
I navigate to the account details page
